meaning: n.农场里的住房,农舍,农家
examples: The work of restoring the farmhouse is complete.
We drove along a muddy lane to reach the farmhouse.
Cirrus made its start in the 1980s, designing kit airplanes out of a farmhouse in Wisconsin.
At Preston Vineyards, weathered picket fencing frames the farmhouse-turned-tasting room, with candy-coloured walls setting a country mood.
